lines.speaker: Cave goblin guard
lines.text: Surface-dweller! You should leave the mines now!

lines.speaker: Cave goblin guard
lines.text: I'm keeping an eye on you, surface-dweller.

lines.speaker: Cave goblin guard
lines.text: Surface-dweller! You will never find your way into the city of Dorgesh-Kaan!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Isn't it through that big door?

lines.speaker: Cave goblin guard
lines.text: Well, yes, but you'll never find your way in!

lines.speaker: Cave goblin guard
lines.text: Surface-dweller! You may not pass through that door!

sections.title: After completion of Death to the Dorgeshuun

lines.speaker: Cave goblin guard
lines.text: I'm keeping an eye on you, surface-dweller.

lines.speaker: Cave goblin guard
lines.text: Surface-dweller! You will never find your way into the city of Dorgesh-Kaan!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I thought I was allowed into the city now.

lines.speaker: Cave goblin guard
lines.text: Oh yes, so you are. I'd better say something different.

lines.speaker: Cave goblin guard
lines.text: Surface-dweller! You will easily find your way into the city of Dorgesh-Kaan!
